mainEntity.name: How long to get recommended by ChatGPT as a Chicago lawyer?
mainEntity.text: How long to get recommended by ChatGPT as a Chicago lawyer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 3-6 months for Chicago lawyers with aggressive SEO, reviews, and content; faster if featured in Best Lawyers or top Google results.

suggestedAnswer.text: Depends on competition—start with local citations, then content. Chicago's market is saturated, so specialize. Track progress weekly. Clients may expect quick wins, but AI lags web indexing.

name: Timeline for Chicago ChatGPT Recommendations
description: Typically 3-6 months for Chicago lawyers with aggressive SEO, reviews, and content; faster if featured in Best Lawyers or top Google results.
